problems.title: Two Sum
Add Two Numbers
problems.solution:
class ListNode:
    def __init__(self, val=0, next=None):
        self.val = val
        self.next = next

def addTwoNumbers(l1, l2):
    def list_to_linked(arr):
        if not arr: return None
        head = ListNode(arr[0])
        curr = head
        for val in arr[1:]:
            curr.next = ListNode(val)
            curr = curr.next
        return head
    
    l1 = list_to_linked(l1)
    l2 = list_to_linked(l2)
    
    dummy = ListNode(0)
    curr = dummy
    carry = 0
    
    while l1 or l2 or carry:
        val1 = l1.val if l1 else 0
        val2 = l2.val if l2 else 0
        total = val1 + val2 + carry
        
        carry = total // 10
        curr.next = ListNode(total % 10)
        curr = curr.next
        
        if l1: l1 = l1.next
        if l2: l2 = l2.next
    
    result = []
    curr = dummy.next
    while curr:
        result.append(curr.val)
        curr = curr.next
    return result

problems.title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
problems.solution:
def lengthOfLongestSubstring(s):
    char_set = set()
    left = 0
    max_len = 0
    
    for right in range(len(s)):
        while s[right] in char_set:
            char_set.remove(s[left])
            left += 1
        char_set.add(s[right])
        max_len = max(max_len, right - left + 1)
    
    return max_len

Maximum Subarray
problems.solution:
def maxSubArray(nums):
    max_sum = nums[0]
    current_sum = nums[0]
    
    for i in range(1, len(nums)):
        current_sum = max(nums[i], current_sum + nums[i])
        max_sum = max(max_sum, current_sum)
    
    return max_sum

Rotate Array
problems.solution:
def rotate(nums, k):
    n = len(nums)
    k %= n
    nums[:] = nums[-k:] + nums[:-k]
    return nums

Power of Two
problems.solution:
def isPowerOfTwo(n):
    return n > 0 and (n & (n - 1)) == 0

problems.title: Delete Node in a Linked List
Valid Anagram
Missing Number
problems.solution:
def missingNumber(nums):
    n = len(nums)
    expected_sum = n * (n + 1) // 2
    actual_sum = sum(nums)
    return expected_sum - actual_sum

problems.title: Ugly Number
Add Digits
Excel Sheet Column Number
Factorial Trailing Zeroes
Excel Sheet Column Title
problems.solution:
def convertToTitle(columnNumber):
    result = ""
    while columnNumber > 0:
        columnNumber -= 1
        result = chr(columnNumber % 26 + ord('A')) + result
        columnNumber //= 26
    return result
